name: toneos
description: ToneOS home theater OS prototype for Windows gaming and media PCs.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/steam-scanner.js && node --check electron/media-library.js && node --check electron/media-server.js && node --check electron/settings-store.js && node --check electron/streaming-providers.js && node --check electron/live-tv.js
